title: Telefónica CAMARA Device Structure
description: Field documentation for the Device identifier object used across Telefónica Open Gateway CAMARA APIs.
note: At least one identifier field must be provided. phoneNumber is most commonly used.

fields.name: phoneNumber
fields.description: E.164 formatted phone number (e.g., +34123456789). Most commonly used identifier.

fields.name: networkAccessIdentifier
fields.description: Network Access Identifier for cellular networks.

fields.name: ipv4Address
fields.description: Public IPv4 address and optional port for device identification.
